name: close
description: Manage leads, contacts, and opportunities in Close CRM

envVars.name: CLOSE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Close API key (used as the HTTP Basic username)

envVars.name: CLOSE_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: HTTP Basic password for Close — always leave this set to an empty string; Close authenticates with the API key as username and a blank password

tools.name: List Leads
tools.description: List or search leads in Close using the lead query language

query.description: Close search query, e.g. "company: Acme" or "lead_status: Potential"

_skip.description: Number of leads to skip for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: lead contacts, addresses, custom fields, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Lead
tools.description: Get full details of a Close lead, including contacts and opportunities

tools.name: Create Lead
tools.description: Create a new lead in Close, optionally with contacts

status_id.description: Lead status ID (defaults to the organization's first status)

tools.name: Update Lead
tools.description: Update fields on an existing Close lead

tools.name: List Opportunities
tools.description: List opportunities, optionally filtered by lead

lead_id.description: Only return opportunities for this lead ID

_skip.description: Number of opportunities to skip for pagination

tools.name: Create Opportunity
tools.description: Create an opportunity on a Close lead

lead_id.description: Close lead ID the opportunity belongs to

status_id.description: Opportunity status ID (defaults to the organization's first status)

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List contacts, optionally filtered by lead

lead_id.description: Only return contacts for this lead ID

_skip.description: Number of contacts to skip for pagination

prompts.title: Review my pipeline
prompts.prompt: List my open opportunities in Close with their values and confidence, grouped by status.

prompts.title: Add a lead
prompts.prompt: Create a new lead in Close with a company name, website, and a primary contact.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Close API Setup

steps.title: Create a Close account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.close.com/ — a 14-day free trial works for testing the API.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In Close, go to Settings → Developer → API Keys (https://app.close.com/settings/developer/api-keys/) and create a new API key. Keys are scoped to your organization and inherit your user's permissions.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add CLOSE_API_KEY to your .env. Set CLOSE_API_PASSWORD to an empty string (or leave it unset) — Close uses HTTP Basic auth with the API key as the username and a blank password.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Leads tool with no query.

notes: Close recommends API keys (HTTP Basic, key as username, empty password) for server-side integrations; OAuth is reserved for user-facing public apps
Lead, opportunity, and contact endpoints use trailing slashes (e.g. /api/v1/lead/)
Monetary values like opportunity value are expressed in cents
